description: Project-specific security boundaries and rules. All AI agents must enforce these rules when writing or reviewing code.

file_download_trigger.rule: Force strict whitelisting. Appended files must be restricted to '.json' or '.txt' and have explicitly designated MIME types. Never use arbitrary user input for filenames.

dom_operations.rule: Always prefer `textContent`. If SVG mixed content requires text updates, find the TEXT_NODE and update its `textContent` rather than using `innerHTML` on the parent.

source_maps.rule: Source maps MUST be disabled in production (`NODE_ENV=production`) to prevent reverse engineering.

console_stripping.rule: Do not use `drop_console: true`. Use `pure_funcs: ['console.log', 'console.debug']` to remove noise while keeping `info`, `warn`, and `error` for crash tracking.

log_sanitization.rule: Rely on `LogSanitizer` to strip sensitive properties (like `sender`, `tab`, PII) before emitting logs in production.

remediation_flow: Use `overrides` in package.json to lock safe version ranges.
Run CI checks to block vulnerable versions.
Run tests (`npm run test:quick`) to verify no regressions.
